title: Lubriderm + American Spirit Grocery List (Feb 2026)
html:
TL;DR

  • 9-item shopping list captured in Apple Notes on 2026-02-16: lotion, two packs of American Spirit cigarettes (turquoise + yellow), the Q-less card game, brown eggs, whole milk, small ice, unbleached AP flour, Martinelli's apple juice (glass bottle).
  • Title is "Lubriderm" because Apple Notes auto-titles from the first line — pure specimen.
  • The American Spirits + the cards-and-juice-and-flour combo suggests a hosting-night grocery run, possibly for Emily's next visit to Austin (between her November visit and March visit).
  • First confirmed mention of Yahir buying cigarettes in the corpus — a small but specific datapoint in the Austin-era texture.
  • Sits in the grocery list as mental model thread alongside the Feb 2025 categories list and the August 2025 camping list.

Notes

The list, in source order:

  • Lubriderm (lotion)
  • American Spirit turquoise + yellow (two cigarette pack colors — turquoise = Mellow Yellow, yellow = Ultra Light)
  • Q-less (a single-player dice/word game)
  • Brown eggs
  • Whole milk
  • Small ice
  • Unbleached all-purpose flour
  • "msartinellis apples juice (glass bottle)" — i.e., Martinelli's sparkling cider in the iconic glass bottle

The composition is too specific to be a routine grocery run. Cards + flour + glass-bottle juice + ice reads like prep for a guest, possibly a date night — pair with the "exactly what I want with Emily" wishlist, where Yahir explicitly fantasizes about Emily-cooked dinners and shared bottles. February 2026 sits between the November visit and the March visit, so this could be the mid-cycle restock or prep for a brief drop-in.

The American Spirit two-color buy is a small but real datapoint: Yahir is a casual smoker in this period, and is brand-loyal (American Spirit, not Marlboro / generic). Worth noting against the gym-and-protein register that dominates the rest of his Austin notes — he is metabolizing some contradiction.
